headline: Klarna (KLAR) Partners With Ulta Beauty To Bring Flexible Payments To U.S. Shoppers
summary: Klarna Group (NYSE:KLAR) has partnered with Ulta Beauty to offer flexible payment options to U.S. shoppers. The arrangement will allow Ulta customers to use Klarna Group's pay-over-time services at checkout. The partnership extends Klarna Group's footprint in the U.S. beauty retail sector and targets millions of Ulta shoppers. Klarna Group enters this Ulta Beauty partnership with its stock trading at $17.6 and a mixed recent track record. NYSE:KLAR is up 6.3% over the past week and 16.0%...
